Senior Machine Learning Engineer — LLM Systems
Acme AI, San Francisco CA (Remote OK)

About the Role
We are looking for a Senior ML Engineer to join our LLM Systems team. You will build and optimize
large-language-model inference pipelines, design RAG architectures for our enterprise search product,
and collaborate with platform engineers to deploy models on GCP and AWS at scale.

Responsibilities
- Design and implement production LLM inference pipelines with low-latency requirements
- Build and maintain RAG systems using vector databases (ChromaDB, Pinecone, or similar)
- Optimize model throughput using TensorRT, ONNX, and quantization techniques
- Write clean, production-quality Python with strong typing and test coverage
- Collaborate with MLOps to containerize and deploy on Kubernetes / Cloud Run

Requirements
- 3+ years of ML engineering experience in production environments
- Strong Python skills; C++ a plus for performance-critical components
- Experience with PyTorch, Hugging Face Transformers
- Hands-on experience with LangChain or LangGraph for agentic workflows
- Familiarity with cloud platforms: GCP or AWS
- Experience with Docker and Kubernetes

Nice to Have
- TensorRT or ONNX optimization experience
- Background in medical imaging or other regulated-domain ML
- Experience with autonomous systems or robotics (ROS 2)
- MS or PhD in CS, EE, or related field
